feat.name: Hindquarter Kick
feat.text: You hold your prey's defensive limbs in place with your claws while delivering a swift kick to their unprotected sides. Shift to talon stance and make two spinning talon Strikes against the grabbed creature. Apply your multiple attack penalty to these Strikes normally. You then release the grabbed creature.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.requirement: You are in claw stance and have grabbed a creature.
